news.t: The Most Compelling ETF Launches in Q2
Tuttle Capital Launches “Permanent Portfolio”-Focused, Multi-Asset ETF
All Weather, Reimagined: Tuttle Capital Launches Porter & Company Porter Portfolio Index ETF (PCPP)

overview.description: The Porter & Company Porter Portfolio Index ETF (PCPP) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Porter & Co. Porter Portfolio index. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index that allocates across property and casualty insurance companies, capital-efficient equities, hard assets, and short-term fixed income investments. The fund seeks to replicate the indexs strategic asset allocation approach, including exposure to Bitcoin and precious metals through a Cayman subsidiary. PCPP was launched on Jun 5, 2026 and is issued by Porter & Company.

data.title: Tuttle Capital Launches “Permanent Portfolio”-Focused, Multi-Asset ETF
data.text: The ETF ecosystem continues to grow and change, with the wrapper's flexibility making it a strong vehicle for investing innovation. Tuttle Capital is the latest firm to add to that wide ETF universe.
